description: Represents a single event instance that occurred in the system

id.description: Unique identifier for the event instance

eventType.description: The type of event that occurred

objectId.description: The ID of the CRM object associated with this event

objectType.description: The type of CRM object (e.g., contact, company, deal)

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred

properties.description: Additional properties associated with the event

title: EventInstance
